metadata.title: Loshon HaTorah / Loshon Hakodesh Source Inventory
metadata.source_policy: Zekelman 2025 Version 2.5 remains canonical. Loshon HaTorah / Loshon Hakodesh material is supplemental evidence only.
metadata.trusted_teacher_source_policy: Loshon Hakodesh / Loshon HaTorah resources are treated as trusted teacher sources. Yossi reviews extraction accuracy, Hebrew fidelity, source-page matching, classification, and mapping rather than re-approving the pedagogy from scratch.
metadata.runtime_policy: This inventory is not runtime-ready and is not question-ready.
metadata.rerun_note: Raw PDFs were discovered and extracted into page-delimited review text on this pass.

sources.title: Loshon Hakodesh Book OCR / Lashon Hakodesh: Mastering the Basics
sources.confirmation_needed_reason: Author metadata is incomplete and OCR/page layout requires Yossi extraction-accuracy confirmation.
extraction_warnings: The pypdf text layer is partial: many main-book pages extracted as blank, while pages 4, 6, 8, 63, and 80-86 contained usable OCR text.
Hebrew, nikud, tables, and line order remain OCR-sensitive and require human source review before downstream use.
The PDF metadata title is 'loshon 2', likely related to the source name cited by the JSONL file, but exact record-to-page alignment still needs human confirmation.
sources.notes: Supplemental enrichment evidence only; it must not override Zekelman 2025 wording, numbering, scope, or level progression.

sources.title: Answer Booklet to Lashon Hakodesh: Mastering the Basics
sources.author: Nachman Marcuson
sources.confirmation_needed_reason: Answer-booklet extraction must be checked for source accuracy and must not become an active answer key.
extraction_warnings: This is an answer booklet and must not be converted into an active answer key or student-facing question source.
The pypdf text layer is usable for page-level review but contains OCR noise, Hebrew distortions, and layout uncertainty.
Use as practice/activity and clarification evidence only; teacher review is still required for any skill-planning decision.
sources.notes: Supplemental source-review evidence only. The answer booklet is not runtime-ready, not question-ready, and not an active answer key.

sources.title: Loshon HaTorah / Loshon Hakodesh foundation rules, source-modeled JSONL
sources.confirmation_needed_reason: Confirm representative JSONL records against the Loshon PDFs before treating them as verified source-derived content.
extraction_warnings: This is an existing source-modeled JSONL artifact, not a raw PDF extraction.
Records cite source_file 'loshon 2.pdf'; the newly found main PDF metadata title is 'loshon 2', but exact record-to-page matching still needs human review.
Records have lesson numbers but page_observed is null, so page-level source matching remains incomplete.
Hebrew examples and nikud-sensitive forms must be checked against the raw PDFs before any downstream use.
sources.notes: Supplemental enrichment evidence only; it must not override Zekelman 2025 wording, numbering, scope, or level progression.
